title: But and and
subtitle: Connect ideas naturally.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: The room is small, but it is clean.
Do you drink coffee at night?
No, I like coffee, but I do not drink it at night.
不，我喜欢咖啡，但晚上不喝。

items.en: The room is small, but it is clean.
Do you drink coffee at night?
No, I like coffee, but I do not drink it at night.
items.zh: 不，我喜欢咖啡，但晚上不喝。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you drink coffee at night?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, I like coffee, but I do not drink it at night.
lines.zh: 不，我喜欢咖啡，但晚上不喝。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, I like coffee, but I do not drink it at night.
lines.zh: 不，我喜欢咖啡，但晚上不喝。

items.en: The room is small, but it is clean.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
